{
  "name": "inspect_repo_gpu_first_golden_v1",
  "description": "Thirty repository-inspection queries covering the v2 contract, reproduced quality failures, the MCP call chain, GPU service control plane, retrieval, validation, escalation, policy, and recovery.",
  "thresholds": {
    "recall_at_10": 0.9,
    "mrr": 0.75,
    "citation_precision": 0.95,
    "missing_evidence_refs": 0
  },
  "queries": [
    {
      "id": "root_cause_false_real_local",
      "query": "Trace the current safeguards that prevent inspect_repo from reporting real_local or answer-ready quality when retrieval and synthesis never reached GPU models.",
      "mode": "auto",
      "tags": ["root-cause-regression", "quality"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_pipeline.py",
        "broker/pkg/schemas/validate.go",
        "broker/pkg/service/service_runtime.go"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "mcp_inspect_repo_call_chain",
      "query": "Trace an MCP inspect_repo tools/call from argument decoding through broker submission and execution staging to the repository worker. Rank the MCP and service entrypoints above generic RAG worker internals.",
      "mode": "auto",
      "tags": ["mcp-call-chain-regression", "ranking"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "broker/pkg/mcp/server.go",
        "broker/pkg/service/service_submission.go",
        "broker/pkg/service/service_execution.go",
        "broker/pkg/tasks/catalog.go"
      ],
      "ordering_rules": [
        {
          "name": "mcp_and_service_above_rag_worker",
          "higher_prefixes": ["broker/pkg/mcp/", "broker/pkg/service/"],
          "lower_prefix": "workers/rag-compression/"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "mcp_query_mode_normalization",
      "query": "Where are inspect_repo query and mode accepted at the MCP boundary, normalized into task parameters, and validated as auto, evidence, or answer?",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["mcp", "contract"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "broker/pkg/mcp/server.go",
        "broker/pkg/tasks/catalog.go"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "repo_inspection_v2_schema",
      "query": "Show the schema validation path for repo_inspection_v2, including the evidence-only rule that omits answer and synthesized findings.",
      "mode": "auto",
      "tags": ["schema", "contract"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "broker/pkg/schemas/validate.go",
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_pipeline.py"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "cpu_cannot_be_answer_ready",
      "query": "Which code prevents lexical CPU fallback from returning an answer-ready inspect_repo result, and how are retrieval, reranking, and synthesis quality recorded separately?",
      "mode": "auto",
      "tags": ["quality-gate", "cpu-fallback"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_pipeline.py",
        "workers/rag-compression/gpu_client.py",
        "broker/pkg/schemas/validate.go"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "syntax_aware_chunk_metadata",
      "query": "Find the repository indexer that creates syntax-aware chunks with path, language, symbol, line range, and content hash metadata.",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["indexing", "chunks"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_index.py",
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_pipeline.py"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "faiss_fts_hybrid_retrieval",
      "query": "Where are the P40 fingerprinted semantic-index status, upsert, and search protocol and the SQLite FTS5 exact-search index used independently for inspect_repo?",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["retrieval", "faiss", "fts5"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_index.py",
        "workers/rag-compression/gpu_client.py"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "rrf_rerank_diversity",
      "query": "Locate reciprocal-rank fusion, top-64 GPU reranking, and the final 12-chunk selection with a two-chunks-per-file diversity cap.",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["retrieval", "reranking", "diversity"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_pipeline.py",
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_index.py"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "dirty_repo_fingerprint",
      "query": "How does inspect_repo invalidate its indexes for HEAD, staged changes, unstaged changes, and untracked file content?",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["indexing", "cache-invalidation"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_index.py",
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_pipeline.py"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "citation_release_validation",
      "query": "Find the validator that rejects malformed synthesis, findings that cite unknown evidence, missing evidence references, and final-pack budget overruns.",
      "mode": "answer",
      "tags": ["citations", "validation"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_pipeline.py",
        "broker/pkg/schemas/validate.go"
      ]

"workers/rag-compression/inspection_pipeline.py"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "citation_release_validation",
      "query": "Find the validator that rejects malformed synthesis, findings that cite unknown evidence, missing evidence references, and final-pack budget overruns.",
      "mode": "answer",
      "tags": ["citations", "validation"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_pipeline.py",
        "broker/pkg/schemas/validate.go"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "same_tier_validation_retry",
      "query": "Where does synthesis retry once on the same GPU tier with validation feedback before escalating an unsupported or malformed answer?",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["synthesis", "retry"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_pipeline.py",
        "workers/rag-compression/gpu_client.py"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "strict_gpu_escalation_order",
      "query": "Trace inspect_repo synthesis escalation in strict P40, four-GPU V100, then adaptive A100 order and show where every attempt and reason is recorded.",
      "mode": "answer",
      "tags": ["synthesis", "escalation"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_pipeline.py",
        "workers/rag-compression/gpu_client.py"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "warm_p40_service_roles",
      "query": "Where are the distinct warm p40-retrieval and p40-synthesis service profiles, capabilities, minimum replicas, and maximum replicas represented?",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["control-plane", "p40"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/types.go",
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/config.go",
        "broker/pkg/config/config.go"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "registry_lease_heartbeat",
      "query": "Find the shared GPU endpoint registry record and the logic for authenticated endpoints, heartbeats, four-hour leases, and lease expiry.",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["control-plane", "registry", "lease"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/registry.go",
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/types.go"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "unhealthy_p40_replacement",
      "query": "How does the service reconciler detect a stale or unhealthy P40 endpoint and replace it without making an inspection request launch the model?",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["control-plane", "health"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/reconciler.go",
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/health.go",
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/registry.go"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "capability_replica_health",
      "query": "Where does list_local_capabilities expose per-tier active and starting replicas, queue state, endpoint health, model profile, context limit, GPU count, and supported operations?",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["capabilities", "control-plane"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "broker/pkg/mcp/server.go",
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/reconciler.go",
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/types.go"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "v100_four_gpu_placement",
      "query": "Show the Slurm placement path that requests gpu:v100:4 on one node and selects the required v100-reasoning model profile and tensor-parallel runtime arguments.",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["slurm", "v100"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "broker/pkg/backends/slurm/backend.go",
        "broker/pkg/backends/slurm/gpu_service.go",
        "broker/pkg/config/config.go",
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/config.go",
        "configs/broker/slurm-p40-a100.env.example"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "adaptive_a100_gpu_count",
      "query": "Where does V100 availability, queue, timeout, or service failure select one A100, while OOM, context overflow, invalid synthesis, or model-limit failure selects four A100s?",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["a100", "escalation"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/adaptive.go",
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_pipeline.py"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "service_startup_not_request_worker",
      "query": "Demonstrate that GPU model startup is owned by scheduler-managed service jobs and the reconciler rather than the inspect_repo request worker.",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["control-plane", "startup"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/reconciler.go",
        "broker/pkg/backends/slurm/gpu_service.go",
        "deploy/slurm/gpu_service.slurm",
        "broker/pkg/service/service_submission.go"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "registry_auth_redaction",
      "query": "Find where GPU service endpoints use bearer authentication internally while release diagnostics redact the credential.",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["security", "registry"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/types.go",
        "workers/rag-compression/gpu_client.py",
        "workers/gpu-service/main.py",

"broker/pkg/service/service_submission.go"
      ]
    },
    {

      "id": "token_explicit_budgets",
      "query": "Trace retrieval_token_budget, evidence_token_budget, final_pack_token_budget, and synthesis_context_token_budget from request validation into the inspection pipeline.",
      "mode": "evidence",

      "relevant_paths": [

      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "compact_release_optional_trace",
      "query": "Where does inspect_repo release only the result, evidence pack, and compact GPU diagnostics by default while keeping full retrieval traces optional?",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["artifacts", "release"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_pipeline.py",
        "workers/rag-compression/main.py",
        "broker/pkg/service/service.go"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "broker_restart_registry_recovery",
      "query": "How does a broker restart reload healthy GPU service leases from the shared registry without duplicating warm replicas?",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["recovery", "registry"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/registry.go",
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/reconciler.go"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "concurrent_scale_limits",
      "query": "Find the concurrency control that keeps warm P40 services between configured minimum and maximum replicas and scale-to-zero V100/A100 profiles at one maximum replica.",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["control-plane", "concurrency"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/types.go",
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/registry.go",
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/reconciler.go",
        "broker/pkg/gpuservice/config.go"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "authorized_repo_inputs",
      "query": "Trace canonical repository file URI normalization and staged input-manifest resolution before inspect_repo discovers local files.",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["inputs", "staging"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "broker/pkg/service/service_submission.go",
        "broker/pkg/service/service_execution.go",
        "workers/rag-compression/main.py"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "audit_gpu_attempts",
      "query": "Where are inspect_repo tier attempts, Slurm job IDs, GPU counts, model profiles, failure categories, and escalation reasons retained in compact job diagnostics without leaking bearer tokens?",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["audit", "diagnostics"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_pipeline.py",
        "broker/pkg/service/service_runtime.go"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "fingerprinted_index_cache",
      "query": "Find the private fingerprinted cache for repository lexical indexes, GPU embeddings, and optional FAISS vectors, including dirty-content invalidation.",
      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["cache", "indexing"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_index.py",
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_pipeline.py"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "required_deployment_profiles",
      "query": "Which deployment configuration fields require explicit model path, quantization, context limit, runtime, and runtime arguments for all five GPU service tiers?",
      "mode": "evidence",

    {

      "id": "remove_canned_query_handlers",

      "mode": "evidence",
      "tags": ["regression", "canned-handlers"],
      "relevant_paths": [
        "workers/rag-compression/inspection_pipeline.py",
